name: ᴀ ᴍ ᴜ ʟ x ᴍᴜsɪᴄ ✨
description: A Telegram Music Player Bot by jeet Rathore, written in Python with Pyrogram and Py-Tgcalls.

MONGO_URL.description: Get a mongodb url from https://cloud.mongodb.com.

LOGGER_ID.description: Your log group ID, add your bot there and promote as an admin.

OWNER_ID.description: The user id of user whom you would like to add as OWNER.

SESSION.description: A Pyrogram v2 String Session from @StringFatherBot on Telegram.

SUPPORT_CHAT.description: Your Telegram support group link (e.g. https://t.me/+xxxxxxxx or https://t.me/username)

SUPPORT_CHANNEL.description: Your Telegram support channel link (e.g. https://t.me/username)
